dashboard.title: Learning Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Hi {{name}}, here is the full picture of your learning data.
dashboard.subtitleGuest: Please log in to view your learning progress.
dashboard.learnedToday: You have studied {{minutes}} minutes today, goal {{goal}} minutes. Keep it up!
dashboard.moduleTip: Consistent practice will gradually raise these metrics
dashboard.heatmapSubtitle: Each cell is one day · darker means more study time

courses.title: Leveled Course System
courses.subtitle: Filter by language and level — from zero to mastery.
courses.noResults: No courses match. Try a different filter.

learn.wordMemoryDesc: Flip flashcards, active recall, strengthen long-term memory
learn.speakingDesc: Listen and repeat, build muscle memory

grammarModule.question: Question {{current}} / {{total}}
grammarModule.tip1: Read the whole sentence first, then judge the grammar structure.
grammarModule.tip2: If unsure, go with your intuition first.
grammarModule.tip3: Every explanation is worth reading carefully.

speakingModule.title: Repeat This Sentence
speakingModule.startHint: Tap to start recording and read aloud
speakingModule.privacyHint: Tip: The browser will not upload audio; recording is for local timing only.

listeningModule.title: Listen and Fill
listeningModule.playHint: Tap play (browser will read this text aloud)
listeningModule.tip1: Listen blindly once and see how much you understand.
listeningModule.tip2: Then fill in the blanks while reading to identify weak forms and linking.
listeningModule.tip3: Play repeatedly and read along at the same time.

hero.title: Today, let the world
hero.welcomeBack: Welcome back, <1>{{name}}</1>! You have studied <3>{{minutes}}</3> minutes today, goal {{goal}} minutes. Keep going!
hero.guest: Choose a language you want to conquer and build your learning habit starting today.

languages.choose: Choose the language you are learning

features.title: Four Core Exercises for Complete Fluency
features.desc: Input · Output · Feedback — build real speaking confidence.

items.title: Flashcard Words
items.desc: Spaced repetition — once remembered, never forgotten

items.title: Grammar Practice
items.desc: Instant feedback + explanations, rules made clear

items.title: Speaking Repeat
items.desc: Read aloud to build muscle memory in your tongue

items.title: Listening Training
items.desc: Real context, fill-in-the-blank, hear more clearly

courses.title: Featured Courses
courses.desc: Leveled, progressive, adaptable to multiple learning goals

recommend.title: Personalized Learning Path
recommend.subtitle: A tailored improvement path based on your recent practice data and target language.
recommend.heading: {{name}}, let's strengthen weak spots
recommend.headingGuest: Give your learning direction and clarity
recommend.description: Follow weak-spot → strengthen → comprehensive challenge order to raise each module score.

fallback.title: Flashcard Vocabulary Intro
fallback.desc: Build your first vocabulary set from zero

fallback.title: Basic Grammar Training
fallback.desc: Master the foundational rules of language structure

fallback.title: Daily Conversation Intro
fallback.desc: Repeat the most common spoken expressions

recommend.coursesDesc: Carefully selected by level for systematic learning.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Every persistence deserves to be seen.
achievements.heading: Unlocked {{earned}} / {{total}} badges
achievements.description: Earn honor badges by reaching learning milestones and record every step of growth.

streak-3.title: 3-Day Streak
streak-3.description: Study 3 days in a row to build a small habit

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Share your learning experience and grow with other learners.
community.placeholderLogged: Share an expression you recently learned or ask a question…
community.signature: {{name}} · Every word you say now echoes into the future.
community.empty: No one has spoken in this topic yet. Why not start?

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account info, goals, and preferences.
profile.pleaseLogin: Please log in to view your profile.
profile.bannerText: LinguaVerse records all learning data via the backend API, syncing progress across any device.

settings.title: Language Settings
settings.subtitle: Set your interface language and the language used for word explanations.
settings.interfaceDesc: Controls the language of menus, buttons, and prompts.
settings.nativeDesc: Word definitions and example translations will be shown in this language when available.
settings.targetDesc: The language you are currently learning.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Log in to continue your immersive learning journey
login.errorDefault: Login failed, please check your account or password
login.usageText: Enter your registered email and password to log in. New users please register first.
login.heroDesc: Leveled courses, interactive exercises, and community motivation — turn learning into a habit, not a task.

register.title: Let the whole world
register.description: Register an account to start a personalized leveled learning path, track progress, and grow with learners worldwide.
register.mobileLabel: Language you want to learn most
register.validation: Please fill in username and email, password at least 4 characters
register.errorDefault: Registration failed, please try again later

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage learning content: languages, courses, words, quizzes, listening, and speaking.
admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this {{label}}?
